title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
summary_full: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.
summary_public: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.
